mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO purchase_item (item_id, order_id, drug_id, purchase_num, purchase_price, subtotal, received_num, pending_num, status) VALUES
(#{item.itemId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.drugId}, #{item.purchaseNum}, #{item.purchasePrice}, #{item.subtotal}, #{item.receivedNum}, #{item.pendingNum}, #{item.status})
